caption: A man dressed in a blue traditional martial arts uniform performs a demonstration with a long wooden staff in a large ballroom. He is positioned in the center of a blue carpeted area, surrounded by an audience seated at tables along the perimeter of the room. The room features neutral-toned walls, recessed lighting, and ornate chandeliers. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his weight and rotates his body, swinging the staff in a wide, circular motion. In the initial movements, he holds the staff high and extends it forward, and by the end of the clip, he is pivoting on one foot, bringing the staff across his body in a low, sweeping arc. The audience members, dressed in varied casual and formal attire, remain seated and observe the performance. There is no visible on-screen text or logos in the scene.
